name: Fudge Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter and chocolate together and allow to cool.
2. In a separate bowl, beat together the corn syrup, sugar, salt, and vanilla until well blended.
3. Add the beaten eggs to the sugar mixture and combine thoroughly.
4. Pour the chocolate-butter mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes, or until the top is crusty and set; the center will be slightly jiggly like custard.
6. This dessert pairs well with ice cream or whipped topping.
Serves: 6 to 8
